title: Enrolling in an Evening Cookery Course

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Good evening, Meadowbank Community College, Priya speaking. How can I help?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Hi. I saw a leaflet about your evening cookery courses and I'd like to sign up for one.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Great choice, they're very popular. Let me take your details and get you enrolled. Could I have your surname to start?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Yes, it's Halloran.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Could you spell that for me, please?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Sure. It's H-A-L-L-O-R-A-N. Halloran. First name Tom.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Thank you, Tom. And an email address so I can send confirmation?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: It's tom, dot, halloran, at, gmail, dot com. All lower case.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Lovely. Now, we run three courses this term. There's Italian Cooking, Thai Street Food, and French Pastry. Which one takes your fancy?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Ooh, I was set on the Thai one — actually, no, on second thoughts, let's go with the French Pastry course. I've always wanted to learn to make proper croissants.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Excellent, the French Pastry course it is. That one runs on Thursday evenings, from half past six until half past eight, for eight weeks.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Thursdays are perfect. How much does it cost?

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: The course fee is a hundred and forty pounds for the eight weeks. There's also a separate ingredients charge of twenty-five pounds, which you pay to the tutor on the first evening.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: That's fine. Is there anything I need to bring along?

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: The college provides all the equipment and the aprons, so you don't need to bring anything really — although we do suggest you bring a container to take your bakes home in. Oh, and please wear flat, closed shoes for safety in the kitchen.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Noted. When does it start?

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: The first class is on Thursday the eighteenth of September. I'll put you down now. Your enrolment number is C, then five-one-eight-three — so C5183. Quote that if you need to get in touch.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: C5183. Brilliant. And how do I pay the course fee?

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: You can pay online through our website, or in person at reception. Just make sure it's settled at least one week before the course begins, or the place can't be held. Reception, by the way, is open until eight in the evening on weekdays.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Great, I'll pay online tonight. Thank you so much, Priya.
